items.title: Senior Solution Architect & Technical Leader
achievements: Led architecture for multi-property digital platform serving millions of guests annually
Defined cloud migration strategy and microservices decomposition roadmap
Established engineering standards, code review practices and architecture review board
items.impact: Reduced platform incident rate by 35% while accelerating feature delivery across 10+ brands.

items.title: Technical Architect
achievements: Architected headless CMS and composable commerce solutions for Fortune 500 clients
Led cross-functional teams of 15–25 engineers across PHP, JavaScript and cloud stacks
Delivered performance optimisation programmes achieving sub-2s LCP across properties
items.impact: Won 3 consecutive agency excellence awards for technical delivery and innovation.

items.title: Lead Developer & Solutions Consultant
achievements: Built scalable PHP/MySQL platforms for e-commerce, social and content verticals
Open-sourced widely-adopted libraries including PDO wrapper (600+ stars aggregate)
Consulted on security hardening, API design and database architecture
items.impact: Delivered 30+ production systems with combined reach exceeding 2M active users.

items.title: Software Engineer
achievements: Full-stack development across LAMP stack, early AJAX SPAs and CMS customisation
Introduced automated testing and version control practices to delivery teams
Built internal tooling reducing deployment time from hours to minutes
items.impact: Foundation years establishing deep expertise in web platform engineering.
